Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 31 (N), I can identify its covalently bonded neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of atom 31 (N):**
- Atom 29 (N) - connected above
- Atom 30 (C) - connected to the right
- Atom 32 (N) - connected below

**geomconf_index:** 5099

So atom 31 has 3 neighbor atoms: indices 29 (N), 30 (C), and 32 (N).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 31 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
